creator: alster@vinterdalen.se
text:
Thank you for the good idea!
I like it and think it is the way to go, just as in Arch Linux, indeed.
I could also maintain it, of course.

So, if you like, I can provide 2 patches: one for your gladtex, with update from 1.3 to 1.5 - the latest non-python version, and one for my future py-gladtex. 
I'll try to make it today/tomorrow.

BTW, I'm thinking about better using Pandoc for manpage than go-md2man, as gladtex already have other functionality to be used as a Pandoc document filter anyway.

What do you think?
